description: Compatibility requirements and compliance targets for NC1 implementations and consumers.

nexbus.notes: Transport compatibility is required but wire semantics remain defined in NexBus repositories.

nexcore.notes: NexCore implementations must publish NC1 capability/command declarations.

profile_version_rules.consumer_rule: Consumers claiming NC1 support must handle all required commands/capabilities for declared profile major version.
profile_version_rules.implementation_rule: Implementations must reject unsupported major versions explicitly and declare supported version range.
profile_version_rules.forward_compatibility: Consumers should ignore unknown extension/experimental fields unless marked required.
profile_version_rules.backward_compatibility: Required fields in current major version must remain present across minor updates.

implementation_declaration_requirements: Publish profile id, profile version, and contract_schema_version.
Publish support declaration for every required and optional capability.
Expose required command tokens with documented error behavior.
Expose compatibility metadata in discovery/platform group.

required_command_behaviors.expectation: Returns stage and blocker model for workflow rendering.
Returns applied revision and refresh requirement on success.
Returns test metadata including hazard and gating fields.
Forces immediate stop intent and emits resulting state change.

consumer_expectations.nexsight: Use capability declarations and catalog metadata rather than hardcoded assumptions.
consumer_expectations.compliance: Evaluate implementations against required surfaces and declared stability classes.

deprecation_and_migration.deprecation_notice_requirement: At least one minor release notice before removing optional or extension surfaces.

extended_includes: optional and extension capabilities as declared
test execution flows beyond catalog discovery
compliance_targets.notes: Experimental surfaces are excluded from pass/fail baseline scoring.
